answers: Elections choose leaders. Register to vote, learn about candidates, vote informed.
Understanding elections is important for being an informed citizen.
Elections matters — learn about it and get involved.

feelings.question: elections process ki?
feelings.answer: To understand the election process, one needs to learn about candidates, voting, and registering to vote. The electoral system in a democracy is  principle of representative government where citizens have the right to choose their representatives through an election.
